ipfs_id.description: The IPFS CID of the JSON document representing the multi-page document.

items.description: The IPFS CIDs of the pages in this document.

pages.description: A list of IPFS CIDs representing the pages.

content.description: The content of the multi-page document, which can have dynamic structure.

source.description: Source information for the multi-page document. This can have a dynamic structure.
